name: Tracing
summary: Class that provides useful static methods for debugging, tracing and messaging.

methods.name: Assert(Guid)
methods.summary: Display a typical ASSERT dialog with stack information.

params.name: assert_id
params.doc: ID of assert message. Every assert must have a unique ID so individual messages can be ignored.

methods.name: Assert(Guid, Exception)
methods.signature: public static void Assert(Guid assert_id, Exception exception)
methods.summary: Display a typical assert dialog with stack information.

params.name: assert_id
params.doc: ID of assert message. Every assert must have a unique ID so individual messages can be ignored.

params.name: exception
params.doc: Exception object to harvest further information from.

methods.name: Assert(Guid, String)
methods.signature: public static void Assert(Guid assert_id, string message)
methods.summary: Display a typical assert dialog with stack information.

params.name: assert_id
params.doc: ID of assert message. Every assert must have a unique ID so individual messages can be ignored.

params.name: message
params.doc: The text to display as the assert message.

methods.name: Assert(Guid, String, Exception)
methods.signature: public static void Assert(Guid assert_id, string message, Exception exception)
methods.summary: Display a typical assert dialog with stack information.

params.name: assert_id
params.doc: ID of assert message. Every assert must have a unique ID so individual messages can be ignored.

params.name: message
params.doc: The text to display as the assert message.

params.name: exception
params.doc: Exception object to harvest further information from.

methods.name: DebugLogAddEntry
methods.summary: Add a message to the debug log. If the debug log doesn't exist yet, it will be created. This function will only work if the Grasshopper window exists. This method is threadsafe.

methods.name: DebugLogBeginBlock
methods.summary: Start a new block in the debug data. You must end all your own blocks. This function will only work if the Grasshopper window exists. This method is threadsafe.

methods.name: DebugLogEndBlock
methods.summary: Start a new block in the debug data. You must end all your own blocks. This function will only work if the Grasshopper window exists. This method is threadsafe.
